MINI MINUTES:

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS WB COYLE, NORTH BEACH PARTNERS, LLC and TELEGRAPH HILL PROPERTIES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. The first, second, third, and fourth causes of action are properly pled. A demurrer does not lie as to the heading of civil conspiracy or the prayer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
